positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The foreground features clean, abstract jungle foliage and mystical celestial elements like floating geometric stars and crescent moons. The color palette should be rich jewel tones (deep sapphire blues, amethyst purples, vibrant emerald greens, and glowing copper gold accents). The style should be modern linework combined with mystical vaporwave aesthetics, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, strong contrast between the dark silhouettes and the vibrant, glowy sky. Clean, graphic, isolated on a neutral background.
